channel.title: Pattaya Gym Directory - Fitness / Gym venues
channel.description: Latest fitness / gym venues in the Pattaya Gym Directory.

item.title: Coco Fitness
item.description: Central Pattaya commercial gym on the 4th floor of Mike Shopping Mall. Sea-view cardio, walk-in day passes, towel and locker included, and value monthly pricing.

item.title: Elite Gym & Fitness Pattaya
item.description: Modern facility with top-notch equipment. Integrates yoga and other fitness programs.

item.title: Jetts Fitness Pattaya
item.description: 24/7 fitness chain. Royal Garden Plaza branch closed May 2022; Little Walk remains the only Pattaya club. No-contract memberships, modern equipment.

item.title: Muscle Factory Pattaya
item.description: Largest hardcore gym in Pattaya. Multi-floor 3-story Pratamnak bodybuilding institution. Bangkok sister gym. Industrial fans, no AC.

item.title: Pattaya Marriott Resort and Spa
item.description: 5-star Marriott Bonvoy beachfront resort on Na Jomtien Beach. Multiple outdoor pools, oceanfront fitness centre, Quan Spa (Marriott Asian-wellness signature), Kids Club, direct beach access. Asset World Corp operator.

item.title: Renaissance Pattaya Resort & Spa
item.description: 5-star Marriott Bonvoy Renaissance-brand beachfront resort, opened 2017. 257 rooms across 10 floors. 2 outdoor pools + kids pool + Kids Club + full-service spa + fitness centre. Modern design lifestyle brand. Na Jomtien beachfront.

item.title: InterContinental Pattaya Resort
item.description: 5-star IHG hilltop resort. 3 outdoor pools incl. 25m lap pool, Amburaya Spa, 24-hour fitness, on-site tennis courts, sea-view Cliff restaurant. Pratamnak Hill — adjacent to Royal Cliff / Fitz Club / Pickleball Pattaya luxury cluster.

item.title: Holiday Inn Pattaya
item.description: 4-star Beach Road IHG. Two outdoor infinity pools (Bay Tower L4 + Executive Tower L6), modern fitness centre with Pattaya Bay views, Tea Tree Spa, Kids Club. Central beachfront family-friendly stay.

item.title: Anytime Fitness Pattaya
item.description: Global 24/7 gym franchise with 2 Pattaya locations. Key-fob access, worldwide reciprocity at 5,000+ clubs, no-contract memberships, 1-day free trial, personal training. Clean, predictable, female-friendly alternative to bro-gym Pattaya.

item.title: Dusit Thani Pattaya — Devarana Wellness
item.description: Iconic 5-star Thai-heritage resort since 1973. Devarana Wellness with cascading waterfall garden, fitness centre, traditional Thai massage, yoga, meditation, active stretching. Two oceanfront pools + two private beaches + tennis history.

item.title: Tony's Fitness Gym (Tony's Group Pattaya)
item.description: Legendary old-school bodybuilding gym. Massive free-weights, no-frills, low monthly. A Pattaya institution.

item.title: Platinum Fitness Club
item.description: Modern AC commercial gym. Cardio, weight machines, group classes, sauna.

item.title: Universe Gym
item.description: Excellent machine assortment, multiple membership packages. North Pattaya commercial gym for varying ability levels.

item.title: Fitz Club — Racquets, Health & Fitness (Royal Cliff Hotels Group)
item.description: Award-winning luxury sports club: 7 tennis courts, 2 AC squash courts, table tennis, swimming, gym, professional coaching. Premium tier.

item.title: Fitness 7
item.description: 2000+ sqm, 24-hour gym in Avenue Pattaya. Cardio, weights, free weights, boxing ring, functional training areas.

item.title: True Fitness Pattaya
item.description: Popular fitness chain: HIIT, yoga, spinning. Modern facility, group classes, nutrition counseling.

item.title: Castra Gym
item.description: Relaxed atmosphere from bodybuilders to general fitness. East Pattaya location, less touristy.

item.title: SUN Fitness Pattaya (3 branches)
item.description: 3-branch chain across Pattaya — single membership accesses all. Soi Buakhao + Naklua branches.

item.title: Cross Pattaya Pratamnak
item.description: Hotel fitness facility with day-pass option. Pool, gym, activities.

item.title: Manhattan Pattaya (Hotel Gym)
item.description: Hotel-based fitness + swimming pool. Day pass available.

item.title: Pratumnak Fitness Park (Free Outdoor Calisthenics)
item.description: Pattaya FREE outdoor public fitness park. Free weights + machines + cardio + calisthenics. Pratumnak Hill / Buddha Hill setting. Up to 75lb dumbbells.

item.title: Hilton Pattaya — Fitness, Spa & Pool
item.description: 5-star Hilton with 24-hour fitness center, 16th-floor outdoor infinity pool, eforea Spa multi-award-winning. Beach Road central. Day-pass available.

item.title: Andaz Pattaya Jomtien Beach (Hyatt)
item.description: 5-star Hyatt Andaz boutique. 24-hour Technogym fitness + 3 pools (adult/beachfront/family) + Panpuri Spa with 6 rooms + Japanese onsen + Turkish + Finnish baths.

item.title: Cape Dara Resort
item.description: 5-star beach-cliff luxury. Infinity pool + Luminous Spa + mineral bath + sauna + steam + beauty centre + fitness with yoga classes.

item.title: Mövenpick Siam Hotel Na Jomtien Pattaya
item.description: 5-star Swiss-hospitality (Accor). 24-hour 2nd-floor fitness with floor-to-ceiling windows. 262 rooms. Seafront + lagoon pools. Little Birds Kids Club.
